findings.detail: Simferopol → Country='(empty)', CntryName='', Region='Autonomous Republic of Crimea'.
Search 'Simferopol': No country reference found in static HTML (JS-rendered). Google uses worldview system (gl=us: disputed, gl=ru: Russia, gl=ua: Ukraine).
findings.notes: Google shows different borders based on viewer location. International view shows dashed/disputed border.

findings.detail: API returned HTTP 401. Bing Maps known to show dashed/disputed border.
findings.notes: Microsoft historically shows Crimea with dashed disputed border.

findings.detail: Simferopol → full_name='Симферополь'. Russian service treating Crimea as Russian territory.
findings.notes: Russian map service. Uses 'Республика Крым' (Russian Federation admin name).
